pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.4.2 to 3.0.13 to align with the Java 17 migration target.
Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to enforce compilation for the new JDK.
Replace thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity5 with springsecurity6 to support Spring Security 6 in Spring Boot 3.
Switch from the legacy mysql-connector-java to the new mysql-connector-j artifact required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Add MapStruct library for type-safe bean mapping.
Add MapStruct annotation processor to generate implementation classes at compile time.
Define explicit Lombok version property for consistent dependency management.
Add Testcontainers library for integration testing with Docker containers.
Add MySQL module for Testcontainers to support database integration tests.
Add OpenCSV library for handling CSV file operations.
Add Thymeleaf Layout Dialect for better template inheritance and layout management.
Add Bootstrap WebJar for frontend styling.
Add jQuery WebJar for frontend JavaScript functionality.
Add WebJars Locator Core to resolve WebJar resources dynamically.
Add Global Payments SDK for payment processing integration.
Add Spring Boot Actuator for production-ready features like health checks and metrics.
Add Spring Boot Admin Client for monitoring and managing Spring Boot applications.
Add Mockito Core for unit testing mocking capabilities.
Add Salty Coffee library for NaCl-based encryption/decryption.
Add OpenRewrite Maven plugin to automate code migration recipes for Spring Boot 3.
Configure Maven Compiler Plugin with annotation processors for Lombok, MapStruct, and Hibernate.
Add Build Helper Maven Plugin to include generated sources in the compilation path.
Add Git Commit ID Maven Plugin to generate git properties for build information.
Add Docker Maven Plugin to build and tag Docker images during the build process.
Enable build-info goal in Spring Boot Maven Plugin to generate build metadata.

Exclude compressed log files from version control to prevent repository bloat.
Exclude temporary files from version control to keep the repository clean.
Exclude the scripts directory from version control, likely containing local or environment-specific automation.
